prompt_inputs.goal: Marathon race day carb-loading and sustained endurance energy

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers all meals for one full day (breakfast, lunch, dinner, snacks)
Emphasizes carbohydrate-rich foods appropriate for endurance performance
Respects vegetarian and dairy-free dietary restrictions
Plan is compact and concise (minimal elaboration)
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a specific sport discipline and performance goal - create a 1-day meal plan for a marathon runner focusing on carb-loading and endurance performance

prompt_inputs.goal: High-intensity CrossFit training with muscle maintenance
prompt_inputs.restrictions: Vegan, nut allergies, maximum 15 minutes prep time per meal

solution_criteria: Meal plan includes exactly 3 meals that are vegan and nut-free
Each meal requires 15 minutes or less to prepare
Total daily calories and protein are appropriate for an 82kg athlete doing CrossFit
Plan is presented in a compact, easy-to-read format for one day
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with dietary restrictions and preferences - generate a meal plan for a vegan CrossFit athlete with nut allergies and limited cooking time

prompt_inputs.goal: Active recovery nutrition with 55% carbs, 25% protein, 20% fat to support muscle repair and glycogen replenishment

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers a full day with breakfast, lunch, dinner, and 1-2 snacks
Macronutrient distribution aligns with specified goals (55% carbs, 25% protein, 20% fat)
All meals comply with vegetarian and dairy-free restrictions
Plan is concise and practical for a professional athlete on active recovery day
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with recovery-focused nutrition - design a meal plan for a professional soccer player on an active recovery day with specific macronutrient targets
